sizing_rule.note: Scale position size proportionally with account equity growth using anti-martingale approach. Increase position size at 5-10% equity milestones. Optimal for trend-following strategies using equal units model (account_equity / (5 * avg_position_value)). Rebalance monthly.

source_rule_text: A trader should scale position size proportionally with account equity growth using anti-martingale models, with the percent risk model being optimal for trend-following strategies.
